title: The Pillars of Reliable Human-Centred AI Systems
description: A flowchart illustrating the core software engineering practices and principles that ensure the reliability and trustworthiness of AI systems designed for human use.
relationships: Stakeholder needs drive the initial requirements engineering. These requirements inform a robust and secure architecture. This architecture is implemented and then rigorously tested and validated. Once deployed, the system is continuously monitored, creating feedback loops that fuel iterative improvement and redeployment, closing the cycle.
